name: OLAMETER.COM
message: [AI generated] Olameter is a diverse service company providing field metering services to gas, water and electric utilities, municipalities and cooperatives. It is based in Los Angeles, California, USA. The company offers a wide range of integrated utility solutions such as meter reading, customer service, AMR/AMI installations, meter testing, and field collection services among others. Their mission is to provide cost-effective, efficient, and innovative solutions.
